title: Eva operating picture dogfood workflow
user_task: As Eva, normalize GitHub operating items, inspect recent Codex session cards, ask for attention/project/business pulse, and produce a ranked operating picture without raw transcript reads.
expected_public_safe_evidence: GitHub PR statusCheckRollup normalized to checks_pending or checks_failed reason codes
green closed GitHub items omitted unless include_green is requested
recent Codex session cards with clean card title, summary, objective, and nextAction fields
customer_impact, runtime_impact, security_impact, or production_impact reason codes outranking ordinary current-lane PRs
current_lane and fresh_signal reason codes for current actionable GitHub PRs
low_confidence_downgraded reason codes for old missing-evidence Codex cards
sourceCoverage and authorityCoverage showing P1 source gaps as not_configured
ranked topAttention card ids and evidence ids
private_data_exclusions: support-control secrets or customer runtime data
proof_boundary: Dry-run dogfood scenario contract for deterministic Eva Operating Picture behavior. It may prove the current fixture workflow for LCO/Codex cards, public-safe GitHub inputs, ranking, source coverage, and clean card presentation, but does not prove full business truth, live GitHub collection, Notion, support-control, Company Brain, Stripe, model summarization, customer readiness, live Codex control, GUI mutation, npm publish, GitHub Release creation, or 1.0 readiness.
next_action: Run this scenario through strict eval sweeps plus a local OpenClaw gateway tool-smoke when the gateway is ready; record only public-safe card ids, reason codes, coverage, confidence, hashes, and blocker codes.
